title: Eclipse SMP+
description: A Vanilla Plus Modpack for the Eclipse SMP+ server.
body:
Eclipse SMP+ is a carefully curated Vanilla Plus modpack built for the Eclipse SMP server. The goal of this pack is to stay true to the feel of classic Minecraft while adding just enough to keep exploration, building, and performance fresh and exciting.

Featured mods include:

Blockus – expands building possibilities with a wide variety of decorative and functional blocks.

Wilder Wild – enhances biomes and world generation, bringing more life, detail, and adventure to exploration.

Performance Mods – numerous optimizations under the hood to keep gameplay smooth and stable, even as the world grows.

This pack doesn’t overhaul Minecraft, it enhances it. If you love the core game but want a little more variety, polish, and smoothness, Eclipse SMP+ offers the perfect balance.
